title: Personality router — signal fan-out to all active personalities
acceptance_criteria: PersonalityRouter class subscribes to signals.generated Redis stream using consumer group 'personality-router'/'primary'

On each signal: (1) queries personality_configs WHERE is_active=TRUE AND phase<=1; (2) pre-fetches DailyState for ALL active personalities in a single batch SQL query (one query, not N queries); (3) runs runPersonalityFilter for all personalities in parallel via Promise.all (this is safe because filter is pure and reads only pre-fetched state); (4) for personalities that passed all 5 stages, calls portfolioRiskCheck (T-31) before opening any trade

Portfolio risk check is serialized (runs AFTER Promise.all filter results are known, NOT inside the parallel fan-out): a personality that passes filters is added to a sequential queue for portfolio-gated trade opening
TradeIntent type exported: { personalityId: string; signal: IncomingSignal; personality: PersonalityConfig }
After portfolio check passes, emits trade intents to the correct management handler (Holder/Adjuster/Reducer) based on personality.management_style

IncomingSignal type exported: { signalId: string; signal_type: 'MOMENTUM_EXHAUSTION'|'SCHEDULED'|'PULLBACK'; underlying: string; atm_strike: number; spot: string; straddle_value: string; vix: string|null; adjusted_probability: number; confidence_tier: string; signal_time: number }

Startup reconciliation: PersonalityRouter.start() loads all paper_trades WHERE status='open', re-adopts each into the correct management handler based on the trade's personality_id → personality.management_style. This ensures positions opened before a restart are still managed correctly
VIX staleness gate: if the last VIX tick was more than VIX_STALE_MS (env, default 300000 = 5 minutes) ago, block all new opens portfolio-wide and log a warning
Unit test: given 3 signals and 9 active personalities (1 filtered per stage), correct personalities receive trade intents and others don't
Integration test: PersonalityRouter + Redis + DB (requires Docker services) — fire one MOMENTUM_EXHAUSTION signal and assert all qualifying personalities get trade intents within 200ms
output_format: code plus plain English explanation of every non-obvious decision
